remediation_phases.description: Resolve rust-lld WIT symbol linker failure
Authenticate gateway executor RPC with capability token + Unix socket
Fix validation receipt to bind actual processed_data (two-pass execution)
Remove worker privateKeyHex from bridge; keys generated inside Python executor
Block legacy private-key paths in live mode; add CI audit guard
T3nInvocationEvidence + T3nAttestedEvidenceVerifier; live mode requires platform evidence
Align contract state scope claims with actual stateless WIT capabilities
Proof manifest - all phases committed, replay proof generated

note: This file is separate from deployment_manifest.json which must remain schema-valid against adn-release-proof-v1
